title: rosa cinnamomea f. lancifolia
intro: Rosa cinnamomea f. lancifolia, also known as the Chinese rose or cinnamon rose, is a variant of the cinnamon rose species. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa cinnamomea f. lancifolia include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving blood circulation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin issues such as eczema and acne.
